title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
